name: FancyForms.Form
comment:
FancyForms is a library for building forms in Elm. It is designed with the following goals in mind:

1.  **Type saftey**: Data collected in the forms will be returned directly into a user provided type.
2.  **Ease of use**: No matter how complex the form is, it will only need **one** `Msg` and **one** field on the model.
3.  **Customization**: Users can provide their own widgets and custom validations.
4.  **CSS Agnostic**: Adapts to any CSS framework.
5.  **Composable**: Smaller forms can be combined into larger forms.
6.  **I18n**: Internationalization is supported by avoiding hard coded strings.


# Definition

@docs Form, form, field, isValid, validate, FieldWithErrors


# Wiring

@docs Msg, init, update, render, extract


# List fields

@docs listField, FieldWithRemoveButton, ListWithAddButton


# Fields with Variants

@docs fieldWithVariants, Variant, Variants


# Composition

@docs toWidget, wrap

unions.name: Msg
unions.comment: The message type for the form.

aliases.name: FieldWithErrors
aliases.comment: A function that recieves the markup of a field and combines with a list of errors.
aliases.type: List.List (FancyForms.FormState.Error customError) -> List.List (Html.Html FancyForms.Form.Msg) -> List.List (Html.Html FancyForms.Form.Msg)

aliases.name: FieldWithRemoveButton
aliases.comment: A function that recieves the markup of a list item and combines it with a butoon to remive it from the List.

aliases.name: Form
aliases.comment: A form that collects a value of type `data` and potentially produces errors of type `customError`.
aliases.type: FancyForms.Form.FormInternal { view : FancyForms.FormState.FormState -> List.List (FancyForms.FormState.Error customError) -> List.List (Html.Html FancyForms.Form.Msg), combine : FancyForms.FormState.FormState -> data } customError data

aliases.name: ListWithAddButton
aliases.comment: A function that recieves the markup of a field and combines it with a button to add a new item.

aliases.name: Variant
aliases.comment: A variant for widgets with a "select" notion.
aliases.type: { value : a, id : String.String, label : String.String }

values.name: extract
values.comment: Returns the result of the `combine` function aka the current state of the form.

values.name: field
values.comment: Adds a new field with the given widget to the form
values.type: (data -> value) -> FancyForms.FormState.Widget widgetModel msg value customError -> FancyForms.Form.FormInternal (FancyForms.Form.Field value customError -> c) customError data -> FancyForms.Form.FormInternal c customError data

values.name: fieldWithVariants
values.comment:
Adds a new field to with different variants to the form.
Each variant is represented by a label and a sub form.

The function takes the following arguments:

1.  A widget to select the variant
2.  The default variant
3.  A list of other variants
values.type: (FancyForms.Form.Variants String.String -> FancyForms.FormState.Widget String.String msg String.String customError) -> ( String.String, FancyForms.Form.Form data customError ) -> List.List ( String.String, FancyForms.Form.Form data customError ) -> (data -> ( String.String, data )) -> FancyForms.Form.FormInternal (FancyForms.Form.Field data customError -> c) customError data -> FancyForms.Form.FormInternal c customError data

values.name: form
values.comment:
Defines a new form that fields can be added to.
Takes four arguments:
1, A unique id for the form to be used as id in the DOM

1.  A validator function that takes the form data and returns a list of errors

2.  A function that receives the fields and returns the `view` and `combine` functions

3.  A function that receives the markup of a field and combines it with a list of errors

        myForm : Form Int ()
        myForm =
            Form.form "minimal-example"
                (\data -> [])
                (\errors_ html -> html)
                (\amount ->
                    { view = \formState _ -> amount.view formState
                    , combine = \formState -> amount.value formState
                    }
                )
                |> field (integerInput [])
values.type: FancyForms.FormState.DomId -> FancyForms.FormState.Validator data customError -> FancyForms.Form.FieldWithErrors customError -> a -> FancyForms.Form.FormInternal a customError data

values.name: init
values.comment: Initializes a form state with the default values

values.name: isValid
values.comment: Returns true if the data entered in the form is valid

values.name: listField
values.comment:
Adds a field to the form where the user can add and remove elements.

The first argument is a `ListWithAddButton` function that cobines the inout list with a button to add a new element.

The second argument is a `FieldWithRemoveButton` function that combines one item with a button to remove it.

The third argument is the widget to use for each element in the list.
values.type: FancyForms.Form.ListWithAddButton FancyForms.Form.Msg -> FancyForms.Form.FieldWithRemoveButton FancyForms.Form.Msg -> value -> (data -> List.List value) -> FancyForms.FormState.Widget model msg value customError -> { a | fn : FancyForms.Form.Field (List.List value) customError -> b, count : Basics.Int, updates : Dict.Dict String.String (FancyForms.FormState.SubfieldId -> FancyForms.FormState.FieldOperation -> Json.Encode.Value -> ( Json.Encode.Value, FancyForms.FormState.Effect )), fieldWithErrors : FancyForms.Form.FieldWithErrors customError, validator : e, blur : c -> FancyForms.FormState.FormState, domId : FancyForms.FormState.DomId, isConsistent : FancyForms.FormState.FormState -> Basics.Bool, initWithData : data -> FancyForms.FormState.FormState -> FancyForms.FormState.FormState } -> { fn : b, count : Basics.Int, updates : Dict.Dict String.String (FancyForms.FormState.SubfieldId -> FancyForms.FormState.FieldOperation -> Json.Encode.Value -> ( Json.Encode.Value, FancyForms.FormState.Effect )), fieldWithErrors : FancyForms.Form.FieldWithErrors customError, validator : e, blur : c -> FancyForms.FormState.FormState, domId : FancyForms.FormState.DomId, isConsistent : FancyForms.FormState.FormState -> Basics.Bool, initWithData : data -> FancyForms.FormState.FormState -> FancyForms.FormState.FormState }

values.name: render
values.comment:
Takes the following three arguments to display a form:

1.  a function to turn the forms messages into a `Msg` of the application.

2.  the form

3.  the current state of the form

    type Msg = ... | ForForm Form.Msg | ...
    type alias Model = { ... , formState : FormState, .. }
    myForm = Form.form ...

    view model =
    div [] <| Form.render ForForm myForm model.formState
values.type: (FancyForms.Form.Msg -> msg) -> FancyForms.Form.Form a customError -> FancyForms.FormState.FormState -> List.List (Html.Html msg)

values.name: toWidget
values.comment: Converts a form to a widget.
values.type: FancyForms.Form.Form a customError -> FancyForms.FormState.Widget FancyForms.FormState.FormState FancyForms.Form.Msg a customError

values.name: update
values.comment: Updates the form state based on the form message.
values.type: FancyForms.Form.Form a customError -> FancyForms.Form.Msg -> FancyForms.FormState.FormState -> FancyForms.FormState.FormState

values.name: validate
values.comment: Adds a validator to a widget.
values.type: List.List (FancyForms.FormState.Validator model customError) -> FancyForms.FormState.Widget model msg value customError -> FancyForms.FormState.Widget model msg value customError

values.name: wrap
values.comment: Creates a new `Widget` that's decorated with the given function.
values.type: FancyForms.FormState.Widget widgetModel msg value customError -> (FancyForms.FormState.DomId -> List.List (Html.Html msg) -> List.List (Html.Html msg)) -> FancyForms.FormState.Widget widgetModel msg value customError

name: FancyForms.FormState

unions.name: Effect
unions.comment: Specifies the effect of a field with relation to the focus state.

unions.name: Error
unions.comment: A type for errors that can be generated by a `Validator`

unions.name: FieldOperation
unions.comment:
Specifies the operation to perform on a field. `Add` and `Remove` are
   used for list fields.

unions.name: FieldStatus
unions.comment: The status of a field. We'll only expose the result of a field validation after it has been blurred.

unions.name: FormState
unions.comment: The state of the form. Stores all the values and the status of each field.
cases: { parentDomId : FancyForms.FormState.DomId, values : Dict.Dict FancyForms.FormState.FieldId Json.Encode.Value, fieldStatus : Dict.Dict FancyForms.FormState.FieldId FancyForms.FormState.FieldStatus, allBlurred : Basics.Bool }

unions.name: SubfieldId
unions.comment:
List fields need an index additional to the FieldId to know which
   list item to update.

aliases.name: DomId
aliases.comment: A unique identifier for a field in a form.

aliases.name: FieldId
aliases.comment: A unique identifier for a field in a form.

aliases.name: UpdateResult
aliases.comment: Is returned from the `update` function of a `Widget`

aliases.name: Validator
aliases.comment: A validator is a function that can be used to validate the value of a form or a widget.

aliases.name: Widget
aliases.comment: A widget that can be used to create a form field.
aliases.type: { init : value -> model, default : value, value : model -> value, validate : FancyForms.FormState.Validator model customError, isConsistent : model -> Basics.Bool, view : FancyForms.FormState.DomId -> model -> List.List (Html.Html msg), update : msg -> model -> FancyForms.FormState.UpdateResult model, encodeMsg : msg -> Json.Encode.Value, decoderMsg : Json.Decode.Decoder msg, encodeModel : model -> Json.Encode.Value, decoderModel : Json.Decode.Decoder model, blur : model -> model }

values.name: alwaysValid
values.comment:
Creates a validator that always succeeds.

Useful for forms that fully rely on per-field validations.

values.name: blurAll
values.comment:
Marks all fields as blurred. This is needed to show all errors when trying to submit a 
form without the user having visited all fields.

values.name: blurChildren
values.comment: Internal: Used to recursively blur child fields.
values.type: FancyForms.FormState.FieldId -> FancyForms.FormState.Widget model msg value customError -> FancyForms.FormState.FormState -> FancyForms.FormState.FormState

values.name: encodedUpdate
values.comment: Encodes the update for the given field.
values.type: FancyForms.FormState.Widget model msg value customError -> FancyForms.FormState.SubfieldId -> FancyForms.FormState.FieldOperation -> Json.Encode.Value -> Json.Encode.Value

values.name: formStateDecoder
values.comment: Decodes a form state from a JSON value

values.name: formStateEncode
values.comment: Encodes a form state into a JSON value

values.name: init
values.comment: Creates a new form state with the given values.

values.name: justChanged
values.comment: Wraps the given model with the indication that the field was changed in a way that it must also have been focused.

values.name: justChangedInternally
values.comment: Wraps the given model with the indication that the field was changed but didn't change the focus.

values.name: read
values.comment: Reads the value for the given field.

values.name: subId
values.comment: Calculates the dom id for the given field and subfield.

values.name: updateFieldStatus
values.comment: Updates the status of a field based on an effect

values.name: wasAtLeast
values.comment: Helper to check if a field was visited

values.name: withBlur
values.comment: Wraps the given model with the indication that the field was blurred.

values.name: withFocus
values.comment: Wraps the given model with the indication that the field was focused.

values.name: write
values.comment: Updates the value for the given field.

values.name: checkbox
values.comment: A checkbox widget the collects a `Bool` value

values.name: dropdown
values.comment:
Returns a widget that lets the user select a value from a list of
    variants.
values.type: FancyForms.Form.Variants a -> FancyForms.FormState.Widget String.String FancyForms.Widgets.Dropdown.Msg a customError

name: FancyForms.Widgets.Int

values.name: greaterThan
values.comment: A validator function that ensures the value is greater than `x`

values.name: integerInput
values.comment: A widget that collects an `Int`
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute FancyForms.Widgets.Int.Msg) -> FancyForms.FormState.Widget FancyForms.Widgets.Int.Model FancyForms.Widgets.Int.Msg Basics.Int customError

values.name: lesserThan
values.comment: A validator function that ensures the value is less than `x`

name: FancyForms.Widgets.Text

values.name: notBlank
values.comment: A validator function that ensures that the given string is not empty.

values.name: textInput
values.comment: A text input widget
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute FancyForms.Widgets.Text.Msg) -> FancyForms.FormState.Widget String.String FancyForms.Widgets.Text.Msg String.String customError
